original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Joseph, Sofia, Zoey, and Lucas. Joseph said that Zoey is a knave if and only if Lucas is a knight. As Sofia put it, "If Zoey is a knave then Zoey is a knight". Zoey said, "Lucas is a knave and Lucas is a knight." Lucas was heard saying, "Zoey is a knight". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
